# seerr_users (Data Source)

Get information about all existing Seerr users.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Placeholder ID for the data source.
- `users` (Attributes List) List of users. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--users))

<a id="nestedatt--users"></a>
### Nested Schema for `users`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) The email address of the user.
- `id` (String) The ID of the user.
- `permissions` (Number) Permissions bitmask for the user.
- `username` (String) The username of the user.
